layman_headline: Beaten-down meme coin BONK hits oversold territory during market fear — setting up a potential bounce trade.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fearful mood right now, with most coins drifting lower. BONK, the Solana-based meme coin, has dropped nearly 19% in a week and its RSI indicator has fallen to 29 — a level that historically signals a coin has been sold too hard and is due for a short-term bounce. While the overall trend is still bearish, these oversold conditions during market fear often produce quick 15-25% relief rallies. This is a high-risk, short-duration bounce trade with a tight stop-loss.
layman_action: This is a speculative bounce trade suitable only for risk-tolerant investors. If you enter, use a tight stop-loss at $0.0000025 and plan to take profits quickly around $0.0000036. Keep position size small — no more than 3-5% of your portfolio.
expert_reasoning: BONK's RSI of 29.14 is the standout signal here — deeply oversold territory that our backtested data shows has an 83% win rate across 6 trades. The 5-day momentum of -29.4% represents capitulation-style selling in a meme coin, which frequently produces sharp V-shaped bounces. The Fear & Greed index at 31 is improving week-over-week (from 28.3), suggesting broader sentiment is bottoming. The bearish chart bias (-0.70) and below-all-MAs structure are legitimate concerns, which is why confidence is only 52% and the stop-loss is tight at 15%. The risk/reward of roughly 1:1.5 (risking 15% to gain 22%) is acceptable for an oversold bounce play. High BTC dominance at 56.6% is a headwind for alts, keeping this as a quick hit-and-run trade rather than a longer swing.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.6% continues to suck liquidity from altcoins — BONK could keep bleeding despite oversold readings
Bearish chart structure with price below all major MAs means this is a counter-trend trade that could fail fast
Negative macro backdrop (rising oil/rates, Clarity Act uncertainty) could push Fear & Greed lower and extend the selloff
watch_list: BTC price action around $65,000 support — a breakdown would drag all alts including BONK lower
Fear & Greed index trajectory — needs to continue improving above 30 to support a bounce thesis
BONK daily volume — need to see volume pick up on any bounce to confirm buyers are stepping in
market_context: The crypto market is in a fearful state (F&G 31) with BTC struggling near $65.5K amid rising rates and political uncertainty around the Clarity Act. BTC dominance at 56.6% signals capital is rotating away from alts, making this a challenging environment for altcoin swing trades.
context_banner: Oversold RSI bounce setup in BONK during improving fear conditions — a high-risk, quick-hit counter-trend trade with tight risk management.

key_signals.description: BONK RSI at 29.14 is deeply oversold — our most reliable signal historically with 83% win rate across 6 trades, avg +6.1% return.
Fear & Greed at 31 improving from week avg of 28.3 — trend turning suggests sentiment bottoming, which supports mean-reversion bounce plays.
Bitcoin under pressure from rising rates and Clarity Act uncertainty — explains the broad selloff creating oversold conditions in alts like BONK.
BONK chart bias is bearish (-0.70) with price below all MAs — this is explicitly a counter-trend bounce trade, not a trend-following setup.
S&P launching blockchain fundamentals index signals continued institutional interest in crypto despite short-term bearish conditions.
